name: phase21_23_object_mgmt
outcome_goal: Object type management UI: browse, create, edit schemas, ship Object Manager app

jobs.label: p21_object_type_browser
jobs.prompt:
You are working in /Users/nate/Praxis/Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/.

Create src/modules/tool/ObjectTypeBrowserModule.tsx:

Registered as: id 'object-type-browser', type 'tool', defaultSpan '2x2'.

UI:
- Fetches /api/object-types on mount
- Shows list of types: name, description snippet, property count, icon/emoji
- Click a type: publish to World 'shared.selected_object_type' with full type data
- 'Create Type' button opens inline form:
  - Name (text input, required)
  - Description (textarea)
  - Property definitions: add/remove rows, each with name + type dropdown (text/number/date/email/url/boolean/dropdown/currency) + required checkbox
  - For dropdown type: show options input (comma-separated)
  - Submit: POST to /api/object-types, refresh list
- Selected type highlighted

Register in src/modules/tool/index.ts.
Dark theme CSS variables. Write the file.

jobs.label: p22_schema_editor
jobs.prompt:
You are working in /Users/nate/Praxis.

Two changes:

1. Add POST /api/object-types/update to surfaces/api/workflow_api.py:
- Accepts {type_id, name?, description?, property_definitions?, icon?}
- Partial update: only update provided fields
- Return updated type

2. Create surfaces/app/src/modules/tool/SchemaEditorModule.tsx:
Registered as: id 'schema-editor', type 'tool', defaultSpan '2x2'.

Subscribes to World 'shared.selected_object_type' via useWorldSelection.
When a type is selected:
- Show type name (editable), description (editable)
- Property definitions as editable list: name, type dropdown, required toggle, options (for dropdown type)
- Add property button, remove property button (X)
- Save button: POST to /api/object-types/update
- Show save confirmation

When no type selected: show 'Select an object type to edit its schema'

Register in src/modules/tool/index.ts. Write both files.

jobs.label: p23_object_manager_manifest
jobs.prompt:
You are working in /Users/nate/Praxis. Postgres at postgresql://nate@127.0.0.1:5432/dag_workflow. PATH includes /opt/homebrew/bin.

Run this Python script to create the Object Manager manifest and add Objects to NavBar:

```python
import sys, json
sys.path.insert(0, 'Code&DBs/Workflow')
from storage.postgres import ensure_postgres_available
conn = ensure_postgres_available()

manifest = {
    'version': 2, 'grid': '4x4',
    'quadrants': {
        'A1': {'module': 'object-type-browser', 'span': '2x2'},
        'A3': {'module': 'schema-editor', 'span': '2x2'},
        'C1': {'module': 'data-table', 'span': '2x2', 'config': {'objectType': 'contact', 'publishSelection': 'contact'}},
        'C3': {'module': 'key-value', 'span': '2x2', 'config': {'subscribeSelection': 'contact', 'title': 'Selected Object'}},
    }
}

conn.execute(
    """INSERT INTO app_manifests (id, name, description, manifest, status, created_by)
    VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::jsonb, 'active', 'system')
    ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET manifest = $4::jsonb, description = $3""",
    'object-manager', 'Object Manager', 'Browse, create, and edit object types and their schemas. Manage your data model.', json.dumps(manifest),
)
print('object-manager manifest created')
```

Run the script. Then update App.tsx NavBar to add 'Objects' link pointing to /?manifest=object-manager.
